added_paragraphs: 6. Data Retention, Data Lifecycle, and Security Controls
Security controls relating to our processing of personal data
All personal data we process is protected with industry-standard security controls such as internal access controls and encryption in transit and at rest.
llm_summary: The Anthropic Privacy Policy now includes a new section on data retention, data lifecycle, and security controls, emphasizing that all personal data is protected with industry-standard security measures, including encryption both in transit and at rest. There were no modifications or removals of existing paragraphs in this update.
